mapper.select: select r.* from sys_role r inner join sys_user_role ur on ur.role_id = r.id where ur.user_id = #{userId} and r.status = 1
select role_id from sys_user_role where user_id = #{userId}
select menu_id from sys_role_menu where role_id = #{roleId}
select role_id from sys_user_role where user_id = #{userId}
